form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign fifth of 8 at Plumpton January 26 over 3200m, soft track; 19 len behind Eddie My Eagle carrying 66kg at $13. Previously first up; second of 10 at Goodwood May 2 over 2000m, 1.5 len behind Grecian Legacy with 57kg at $10. Finds a tough assignment so others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run in the final 2 furlongs.

form.formComment: Comes off a 37 day let-up. At the latest run won by 2 len at Newcastle All Weather March 6 over 2500m defeating Golspie carrying 62.5kg at $5.50. The race before that 5th of 7 at Chelmsford on February 12 over 2800m, 13 len behind Carlton with 60kg at $15. Going well and rates highly.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign sixth of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather October 13 over 2220m, 11 len behind Federated with 61kg at $15. First up last campaign ran last of 14 at Haydock Park May 31 over 2400m, 19 len behind Stressfree with 56.5kg at $29. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign fourth in a small field at Fakenham October 17 over 3200m, 24 len behind Squeezebox with 69.5kg at $2. Previously first up; second last in a small field at Goodwood September 2 over 3200m, in the wet; 55 len behind Novelista with 56kg at $15. Doubt he will have much to offer first up.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation when last of 16 at York October 11 over 3260m, 22 len behind Berkshire Sundance with 60kg at $13. When resuming last campaign failed to finish at Aintree in the G1 Anniversary 4YO Juvenile Hurdle April 3 2025 over 3410m. Plenty of more attractive propositions in this race.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation to post a big 4.5 len win. This track November 5 over 2500m slow track defeating Sure And Stedfast with 58.5kg at $4. Previously first up; sixth of 11 at Thirsk September 15 over 1600m, soft track; 8 len behind Day Of Grace carrying 60kg at $10. Looks a key runner.

form.formComment: Returns from a 38-day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 11 at Newcastle All Weather on March 5 over 2040m, head behind Boubyan carrying 60.5kg at $9.50. The race before that 5th of 7 at Newcastle All Weather on January 31 over 2000m, 7 len behind Zryan carrying 56.5kg at $13. Went close last time. Big chance with a repeat of the latest effort.

form.formComment: At the latest run won by a head at Wolverhampton March 20 over 2400m defeating Pleasant Man carrying 62kg at $12. The start before that didn't finish the race at Doncaster February 5 over 3300m. Has the right credentials.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 2nd of 8 at Newcastle All Weather on March 12 over 2500m, 0.5 len behind Clansman with 62.5kg at $4.50. Previously second-up 4th of 13 at Hamilton Park on May 28 over 2600m, 5 len behind King's Scholar with 55.5kg at $26. Genuine galloper and is one of the better hopes.
